_comment: Per-player per-stat post-calibration multipliers (flat_corrections) and role/minutes overrides (players). flat_corrections: residual corrections applied AFTER role-stratified corrections. players: role_bucket_override and minutes_mean_override applied pre-calibration. Computed: 2026-07-07. Updated Phase 8: AT flat corrections recalibrated from run 28847710430 pre-flat values. Base stats target 90% of market; combo stats at max 25x clip.

736._note: Minutes model predicts 11.8 due to DNP row in BDL; 2026 avg: 31.4 min, 16.4 pts, 3.9 reb, 2.9 ast

758._note: 8 early-season DNPs followed by starter-level production (37 pts, 28 pts). Role override prevents inactive_risk classification.
